executives.name: Zula Kropivnitski
executives.background: Ms. Kropivnitski has over 15 years of experience in financial reporting and corporate compliance. She has served as CFO for several public companies listed on the TSX Venture Exchange and the CSE. She is a Certified Professional Accountant (CPA, CGA).

executives.name: Amir Adnani
executives.background: Mr. Adnani is an entrepreneur and the founder of several public companies in the resource sector. He is the founder and CEO of Uranium Energy Corp and the Chairman of GoldMining Inc. He has extensive experience in capital markets and corporate development.

board_of_directors.name: Amir Adnani
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Adnani is an entrepreneur and the founder of several public companies in the resource sector. He is the founder and CEO of Uranium Energy Corp and the Chairman of GoldMining Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Garnet Dawson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Dawson is a geologist with over 40 years of experience in the exploration and mining industry. He has held senior management positions with several public companies and has been involved in the discovery and development of several mineral deposits.

board_of_directors.name: David Gower
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gower has over 30 years of experience in the minerals industry, including senior positions with Falconbridge Ltd. and Noranda Inc. He is currently the CEO of Emerita Resources Corp. and serves on the boards of several public companies.

sources.source_description: Company Website - Management and Directors Page
